description_long: This skyscraper is a tall, rectangular commercial building with a modernist design, featuring a repetitive pattern of horizontal bands of glass windows and metallic or concrete spandrels. The facade is dominated by alternating strips of reflective blue-tinted glass and light gray structural elements, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. The building's roof is detailed with various mechanical units, vents, and a prominent antenna or spire, adding to its urban character. The structure appears to have a flat roof and no visible balconies or external ornamentation, emphasizing its functional, minimalist aesthetic. The windows are arranged in continuous horizontal bands, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. No signage or logos are visible on the exterior, maintaining a clean and professional look.
description: A tall, modernist skyscraper with horizontal bands of blue-tinted glass and gray structural elements, topped with rooftop mechanical units and an antenna. The facade is sleek and minimalist, with no visible signage.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full height of the building with prominent horizontal window bands and a clear view of the rooftop antenna.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the building's narrow profile and the arrangement of rooftop mechanical units and spire.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a similar narrow profile, showing the horizontal window pattern and rooftop structures.
description_view_3: Rear view reveals additional rooftop details and the same horizontal banding, with no visible entrances or signage.
attribute_facade_design: The facade features alternating horizontal bands of reflective blue-tinted glass and light gray concrete or metal spandrels, creating a streamlined, minimalist appearance. The rooftop is detailed with mechanical units and an antenna, with no decorative ornamentation.
